name: Fix stale --class flag help text

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Fix stale --class flag help text is complete and correct

scope: Fix stale --class flag help text in cmd/task/add.go: the help text currently says 'e.g., lang-go' but actual class keys use the 'coding/go' format. Update the example to reflect the real key format used in practice.
success_criteria: The --class flag help text in cmd/task/add.go uses coding/go as its example, matching the actual config key format

breadcrumbs.text: Created 1 child: update-help-text (leaf). Single-file fix, no ordering constraints. The stale example 'lang-go' on cmd/task/add.go:181 needs to become 'coding/go' per the format in internal/config/config.go.
